title: MineColonies: Jade crops addon
description: Adds Jade tooltip support for MineColonies crops.
body:
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c27cdfd4902ef3c8e5977371bb5394908bf621f0.png)

# MineColonies: Jade Crops

A lightweight addon for Jade that adds crop growth information for MineColonies crops.

Track MineColonies crop progress directly in your tooltip with a clean vanilla-style display inspired by Jade’s built-in crop tooltips.

## Features

* Displays crop growth percentage
* Shows when crops are fully mature
* Automatically detects MineColonies crops
* Vanilla-style Jade integration
* Lightweight and optimized
* Multilingual support

## Example

* Growth: 17%
* Growth: Mature

## Supported Versions

* Minecraft 1.21.1
* NeoForge 21.1.227+
* MineColonies 1.1.1300-1.21.1-snapshot
* Jade 15.10.5+

## Dependencies

Required:

* Jade
* MineColonies

MineColonies dependencies:

* Structurize
* BlockUI
* Domum Ornamentum
* Multi-Piston

## Configuration

Configuration file:
`config/mcjadecrops-common.toml`

The tooltip module can also be enabled or disabled directly in Jade settings.

## Languages

* English
* Russian
* German
* Spanish
* Italian
* Japanese
* Korean
* Dutch
* Polish
* Portuguese (Brazil)
* Ukrainian
* Simplified Chinese
* Traditional Chinese
